patterns: Hello
Hi
Hey
Good morning
Good afternoon
Good evening
How are you?
responses: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! What can I help you with?
Hey! Feel free to ask any questions about the college.

patterns: Where is the college located?
Can you tell me the address of the college?
What is the location of the college?
responses: The college is located at: #16-4-1, Subedar Ameer Ali Khan Road, New Malakpet, Hyderabad – 500024. You can contact us at +91 9849650796, +91 9885360757, +91 9848058830, or 040-24561118. Email: info@nsakcet.ac.in / nsakcet@gmail.com.

patterns: What are the contact details of the college?
How can I contact the college?
What is the phone number of the college?
responses: You can contact the college at +91 9849650796, +91 9885360757, +91 9848058830, or 040-24561118. Email: info@nsakcet.ac.in / nsakcet@gmail.com.

patterns: What is the admission process for undergraduate courses?
How do I apply for UG courses?
What is the UG admission procedure?
responses: The admission process for undergraduate courses can be found on the Undergraduate Department page: https://nsakcet.ac.in/ug-department/

patterns: What is the admission process for postgraduate courses?
How do I apply for PG courses?
What is the PG admission procedure?
responses: The admission process for postgraduate courses can be found on the Postgraduate Department page: https://nsakcet.ac.in/pg-department/

patterns: What is the eligibility criteria for admission?
What qualifications are required to apply?
What are the admission requirements?
responses: Eligibility criteria vary by program. Visit the respective department pages for details: Undergraduate - https://nsakcet.ac.in/ug-department/, Postgraduate - https://nsakcet.ac.in/pg-department/

patterns: What courses are offered at the college?
Can you list the courses available?
What programs are available?
What academic programs does the college provide?
What are the courses available for students?
responses:
The college offers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate programs, including:

- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI/ML)
- Internet of Things (IoT)
- Information Technology (IT)
- Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
- Data Science (DS)
- Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE)
- Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)

For more details, visit the Academics page: https://nsakcet.ac.in/academics/

patterns: What is the fee structure for each course?
How much does it cost to study here?
What are the fees for UG and PG courses?
responses: The fee structure is ₹73,000 per year for undergraduate courses and ₹50,000 per year for postgraduate courses.

patterns: Are there any scholarships available?
Does the college provide scholarships?
Can I get a scholarship?
responses: Scholarships may be available. Contact the college administration for more information.

patterns: What facilities are available on campus?
Does the college have Wi-Fi?
Are there labs and libraries available?
responses: The college offers Wi-Fi, a well-equipped library, and advanced labs for various departments.

patterns: What clubs and student organizations are present in the college?
Are there any student societies?
Does the college have student clubs?
responses: The college has societies like IEEE and IEOM and student clubs such as Epoch (AI/ML Club) and CyberElites (Cybersecurity Club).

patterns: Are there any cultural or technical fests conducted?
What events does the college organize?
Does the college have an annual fest?
responses: Yes, the college conducts an annual cultural fest called Zauq-e-Nawab in January.

patterns: What are the placement opportunities at the college?
Does the college offer placements?
What companies visit for placements?
responses: Placement details can be found on the Training and Placement page: https://nsakcet.ac.in/training-placement/

patterns: Goodbye
Bye
See you later
Talk to you later
Take care
responses: See you later! Feel free to reach out if you have more questions.
Bye! Take care and let us know if you need further assistance.
